rule.name: Drupal Debug Mode Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects framework/application debug mode enabled in deployable configuration.
rule.vuln_desc: Debug mode can expose stack traces, internal paths, and sensitive runtime details.
rule.developer: Disable debug mode in production and separate dev/prod config.
rule.reviewer: Verify production config and runtime env disable debug flags.

rule.name: Drupal Dangerous Dynamic Eval/Template Execution
rule.rule_desc: Detects dangerous dynamic code execution primitives in PHP code paths.
rule.vuln_desc: Dynamic execution APIs can lead to remote code execution when user input is involved.
rule.developer: Avoid dynamic execution; use strict allow-lists and safer alternatives.
rule.reviewer: Review data flow into dynamic execution sinks for user-controlled input.

rule.name: Drupal Raw SQL Query Construction
rule.rule_desc: Detects raw/dynamic SQL construction in framework and DB access calls.
rule.vuln_desc: Dynamic SQL with untrusted input can introduce SQL injection vulnerabilities.
rule.developer: Use parameterized queries/prepared statements and validate input.
rule.reviewer: Check whether untrusted data reaches raw SQL APIs without binding.

rule.name: Drupal Permissive CORS Configuration
rule.rule_desc: Detects wildcard CORS settings in application or framework config.
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard CORS may allow untrusted origins to access sensitive endpoints.
rule.developer: Restrict CORS origins to explicit trusted domains.
rule.reviewer: Validate CORS policies are environment-specific and least-privilege.

rule.name: Drupal Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded secret material in source/config.
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded secrets risk leakage through source exposure and artifact distribution.
rule.developer: Move secrets to secure secret management and rotate compromised values.
rule.reviewer: Review whether detected literals are real credentials and enforce secret hygiene.
